items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for fill-rate based pricing, but the evidence provided does not confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions fill-rate based pricing, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate its implementation or validation. The prior steps focus on booking confirmations and other functionalities, but none explicitly address the fill-rate pricing mechanism, leading to an inconclusive result.
